writers.lyricist: Mikkel S. Eriksen/Hallgeir Rustan/Tor Erik Hermansen/Daniel Stephens/Samuel Webbe
writers.composer: Mikkel S. Eriksen/Hallgeir Rustan/Tor Erik Hermansen/Daniel Stephens/Samuel Webbe

lyrics.text: Yo, yo
lyrics.translation: 哟

lyrics.text: Yo, yo
lyrics.translation: 哟

lyrics.text: Your honour please
lyrics.translation: 法官大人

lyrics.text: Gotta believe what I say (say)
lyrics.translation: 请您务必相信我的话

lyrics.text: What I will tell (tell)
lyrics.translation: 我一一细数

lyrics.text: Happened just the other day (day)
lyrics.translation: 过去发生的一切

lyrics.text: I must confess (confess)
lyrics.translation: 我必须诚实招供

lyrics.text: 'Cos I've had about enough (enough)
lyrics.translation: 因为我已经受够

lyrics.text: I need your help (help)
lyrics.translation: 我需要你的帮助

lyrics.text: Got to make this here thing stop (stop)
lyrics.translation: 将事情划上休止符

lyrics.text: Baby I swear I tell the truth (uhuh)
lyrics.translation: 宝贝，我发誓所言千真万确

lyrics.text: About all the things you used to do (come on)
lyrics.translation: 关于你所做过的一切

lyrics.text: And if you thought you had me fooled (come on)
lyrics.translation: 如果你觉得你骗过我

lyrics.text: I'm tellin' you now objection overruled
lyrics.translation: 我会告诉你，反对无效

lyrics.text: Here we go (oh baby)
lyrics.translation: 现在就开始（噢宝贝）

lyrics.text: One for the money and the free rides
lyrics.translation: 第一件，我付出的时间和金钱

lyrics.text: It's two for the lie that you denied
lyrics.translation: 第二件，你矢口否认的谎言

lyrics.text: All rise (all rise)
lyrics.translation: 全体肃立（肃立）

lyrics.text: All rise (all rise, all rise)
lyrics.translation: 全体肃立（肃立）

lyrics.text: Three for the calls you've been making
lyrics.translation: 第三件，你说过的花言巧语

lyrics.text: It's four for the times you've been faking
lyrics.translation: 第四件，你从没有动过真情

lyrics.text: All rise (I'm gonna tell it to your face)
lyrics.translation: 全体肃立（我将当着你的面揭露一切）

lyrics.text: All rise (I rest my case)
lyrics.translation: 全体肃立（我的证词完毕）

lyrics.text: You're on the stand (stand)
lyrics.translation: 你站在审判台上

lyrics.text: With your back against the wall (wall)
lyrics.translation: 你的背倚靠着墙

lyrics.text: Nowhere to run (run)
lyrics.translation: 无处可逃

lyrics.text: And nobody you can call (call) oh no
lyrics.translation: 无人能助

lyrics.text: I just can't wait (wait)
lyrics.translation: 我已迫不及待

lyrics.text: Now the case is open wide (wide)
lyrics.translation: 案件已经明朗

lyrics.text: You'll try to pray (pray)
lyrics.translation: 你试着祈祷（祈祷吧）

lyrics.text: But the jury will decide (decide)
lyrics.translation: 但审判团已经决定（决定吧）

lyrics.text: Baby I swear I tell the truth (uhuh)
lyrics.translation: 宝贝，我发誓所言千真万确（啊哈哈）

lyrics.text: About all the things you used to do (come on)
lyrics.translation: 关于你所做过的一切（来吧）

lyrics.text: And if you thought you had me fooled (come on)
lyrics.translation: 如果你觉得你骗过我（来吧）

lyrics.text: I'm tellin' you now objection overruled
lyrics.translation: 我会告诉你，反对无效

lyrics.text: （噢，宝贝）
One for the money and the free rides
lyrics.translation: 第一件，我付出的时间和金钱

lyrics.text: It's two for the lie that you denied
lyrics.translation: 第二件，你矢口否认的谎言

lyrics.text: All rise (all rise)
lyrics.translation: 全体肃立（肃立）

lyrics.text: All rise (all rise, all rise)
lyrics.translation: 全体肃立（肃立）

lyrics.text: Three for the calls you've been making
lyrics.translation: 第三件，你说过的花言巧语

lyrics.text: It's four for the times you've been faking
lyrics.translation: 第四件，你从没有动过真情

lyrics.text: All rise (I'm gonna tell it to your face)
lyrics.translation: 全体肃立（我将当着你的面揭露一切）

lyrics.text: All rise (I rest my case)
lyrics.translation: 全体肃立（我的证词完毕）

lyrics.text: So step back 'cos you don't know this cat
lyrics.translation: 所以退后一步，因为你不知道她的本色

lyrics.text: I know deep down that you don't want me to react
lyrics.translation: 我了解最深，你不希望我反应过度

lyrics.text: I lay low leaving all my options open
lyrics.translation: 我会低调行事，以释怀之心面对

lyrics.text: The decision of the jury has not been spoken
lyrics.translation: 陪审团的决定还没有被判决

lyrics.text: Step in my house you find that your stuff has gone (gone)
lyrics.translation: 步入我家门，你会发现属于你的家当全无踪影

lyrics.text: But in reality to whom does the stuff belong
lyrics.translation: 事实上，这些东西又属于谁去拥有

lyrics.text: I bring you into court to preach my order
lyrics.translation: 我向法庭投诉，细说自己的原则

lyrics.text: And you know that you overstep the border, uhuh
lyrics.translation: 你也知道自己早已超越界限

lyrics.text: One for the money and the free rides
lyrics.translation: 第一，我付出的金钱及时间

lyrics.text: It's two for the lie that you denied
lyrics.translation: 第二，你矢口否认的谎言

lyrics.text: All rise (all rise)
lyrics.translation: 全体肃立（肃立）

lyrics.text: All rise (all rise, all rise)
lyrics.translation: 全体肃立（肃立）

lyrics.translation: 第三件，你说过的花言巧语

lyrics.text: It's four for the times you've been faking
lyrics.translation: 第四件，你从没有动过真情

lyrics.translation: 全体肃立（我将当着你的面揭露一切）

lyrics.text: All rise
lyrics.translation: 全体肃立（我的证词完毕）
